kernel=Image
arm_64bit=1
enable_uart=1
# Full KMS: kernel drives all displays including the DSI panel
dtoverlay=vc4-kms-v3d
# Touch Display 2 (ILI9881 panel, Goodix touch)
dtoverlay=vc4-kms-dsi-ili9881-7inch
# Keep old firmware away from the DSI panel; the kernel overlay owns it
ignore_lcd=1
# Codec Zero (I2S DAC/ADC, DA7212)
dtparam=audio=off
dtparam=i2c_arm=on
dtparam=i2s=on
dtoverlay=rpi-codeczero
# Footswitches + encoder (compiled from ardor-controls.dts)
dtoverlay=ardor-controls
